value_metric: only substantive changes (body / attachment set / status) create a DocumentVersion; template noise (footer, nav, share widgets, engagement counts, relative timestamps, cookie banners, ads, copyright, ICP) never inflates the version chain; ingestion is idempotent so any task can be safely replayed -- keeping the recoverable history clean and truthful

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: extend NOISE_RULES + fixtures when a new site's boilerplate appears; the engine is rules-only, not wired into the worker/D1 write path yet
